query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN avatarUrl IS NULL AND s3AvatarUrl IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_avatar, SUM(CASE WHEN bio IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_bio, SUM(CASE WHEN enrichedAt IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as not_enriched, SUM(CASE WHEN authorName LIKE '%Pocket Guide%' OR authorName LIKE '%bk_%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as suspect_names FROM author_profiles
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46FBtXPMNF6LwZ8.root --database ehSrGoKN2NYhXg8UYLtWGw --execute SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN avatarUrl IS NULL AND s3AvatarUrl IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_avatar, SUM(CASE WHEN bio IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_bio, SUM(CASE WHEN enrichedAt IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as not_enriched, SUM(CASE WHEN authorName LIKE '%Pocket Guide%' OR authorName LIKE '%bk_%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as suspect_names FROM author_profiles
